subtasks.description: Evaluate user's permissions to update contract terms for vendor 'TechFlow Solutions'. Check access control policies to verify authorization for contract modification.
Update the contract record for TechFlow Solutions to extend the term by 12 months (increment end_date). Execute after permissions are confirmed.
Send notification to procurement team with updated contract details for TechFlow Solutions (vendor, new term end date, update timestamp).

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks required because the query explicitly requests three sequential operations: (1) permission check (policy_action, small tier — single access control rule), (2) contract database update (multitool_plan, mid tier — requires invoking a contract update tool from the enterprise registry with data transformation), and (3) notification delivery (multitool_plan, small tier — straightforward alert dispatch). Dependencies enforce the sequence: permission validation must precede the update, and the update must complete before notification is sent. No cross-recon or sql_gen needed; this is an action workflow, not an analytical query.

output.reason: Contract term extension requires procurement team approval and documented authorization. User context (role, identity) not provided to verify authorization level. Contract modification for vendor agreements triggers multi-step approval workflow.
applied_constraints: Require explicit user role verification (Procurement Manager or Contract Administrator minimum)
Require documented approval from procurement team lead before execution
Mandate audit trail logging of all contract modifications
Conditional on contract value threshold - if >$500K requires CFO sign-off
Notify vendor of term extension only after approval chain completion
Implement change request ticket before modification

arguments.message:
⚠️ Contract Modification Request - PENDING APPROVAL

Vendor: TechFlow Solutions
Action: Extend contract term by 12 months

Policy Compliance Status:
• POL-CONTRACT-MOD: PASS (conditional)
• POL-VENDOR-MGMT: PASS (conditional)
• POL-PROCUREMENT-AUTH: FAIL ❌
• POL-AUDIT-TRAIL: PASS
• POL-ESCALATION-THRESHOLD: PENDING REVIEW

REQUIRED BEFORE EXECUTION:
1. Explicit user role verification (Procurement Manager or Contract Administrator minimum)
2. Documented approval from procurement team lead
3. Verify contract value threshold - if >$500K requires CFO sign-off
4. Create change request ticket

Permission check result: $1.status

Please confirm authorization and required approvals.

arguments.description: Extend contract term by 12 months for vendor TechFlow Solutions. Requires approval chain completion per policy constraints.

arguments.message:
✅ Contract Updated

Vendor: $3.results.vendor
New Term End Date: $3.results.term_end_date
Update Timestamp: $3.results.updated_at

The contract term for TechFlow Solutions has been extended by 12 months.
